reviews.review_description: You are kinda using my trademark and I would like you to change the name, I have been owning a game called Afraid apes for the Past Year and Did not expect someone to steal the name. Please change it, I just dont want problems with you. You kinda stole the name. But Please change and there will be no copyright problems.

Hello I’m Zane and I’m a moderator on this game. The reason why this is the best game ever is because for one the people who helped make this project/game are amazing. Two this game has the perfect amount of fun and scary!
